# Wasmtime Third-Party Inventory

This inventory covers the source-build `wasmtime` host in
`harness/wasmtime`. It is generated from
`cargo metadata --format-version 1 --locked` and is not the packaged
release notice file for `as-harness`.

## Direct Dependencies

| Crate | Requirement | Resolved | Kind | License | Upstream |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `napi-build` | `^2.3.1` | `2.3.1` | `build` | `MIT` | <https://github.com/napi-rs/napi-rs> |
| `anyhow` | `^1.0.100` | `1.0.102` | `normal` | `MIT OR Apache-2.0` | <https://github.com/dtolnay/anyhow> |
| `napi` | `^2.16.17` | `2.16.17` | `normal` | `MIT` | <https://github.com/napi-rs/napi-rs> |
| `napi-derive` | `^2.16.13` | `2.16.13` | `normal` | `MIT` | <https://github.com/napi-rs/napi-rs> |
| `wasmtime` | `^34.0.2` | `34.0.2` | `normal` | `Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception` | <https://github.com/bytecodealliance/wasmtime> |
